items.title: Hinkle Fieldhouse lands 2026 NBA Cup championship game
items.body_excerpt: Hinkle Fieldhouse has hosted basketball games at all levels. Hinkle Fieldhouse has hosted high school and college championship games, so why not add the NBA to the mix? Now it will. The historic gym, on the campus of Butler University, will host the Emirates NBA Cup 2026…
